nodes.label: Art Bell

nodes.label: The Report on Unidentified Flying Objects

nodes.label: Identification studies of UFOs

nodes.label: The Flying Saucers Are Real
nodes.summary: The Flying Saucers Are Real, by Donald Keyhoe, is a book that investigated reports of UFOs by United States Air Force fighters, personnel, and other aircraft, between 1947 and 1950.

nodes.label: Unidentified flying object
nodes.summary: An unidentified flying object (UFO) is an object or phenomenon seen in the sky but not yet identified or explained.
